imageAlt: Bulk Payroll improvements roadmap item preview image
title: Bulk Payroll improvements
summaryBody: Bulk Payroll needs a bigger re-work to make it work in the way the other sections of the dashboard do (mine/groups/all), as it was only really built with the single named Account Manager in mind for running it.
detailBody: Bulk Payroll needs a bigger re-work to make it work in the way the other sections of the dashboard do (mine/groups/all), as it was only really built with the single named Account Manager in mind for running it.
